summary: Anthropic launches Claude Science beta for reproducible scientific research pipelines
Meituan releases LongCat-2.0, an open-source model with 1M context window and 1.6 trillion parameters
Researchers release HaloGuard, an open-weight safety classifier for multilingual LLM safety
OpenAI expands GPT-5.6 access to more developers and enterprise partners
Mistral AI releases Leanstral 1.5, an open-source model for formal proof engineering and automated theorem proving, solving 587 of 672 problems in PutnamBench.
NVIDIA AI introduces ASPIRE, a self-improving robotics framework for zero-shot learning
Ctx.rs releases an open-source command-line tool to index months of history for coding agents
LOOM is introduced as a language that proves what AI-written code is allowed to do
Microsoft introduces MAI-Thinking-1, a reasoning language model developed from scratch, comparable to Claude Sonnet 4.6 in size and performance.
DeepReinforce releases Ornith-1.0, an open-source coding model family that learns to build its own agent scaffold, outperforming Claude Opus 4.7 on agentic coding benchmarks.
Interfaze releases diffusion-gemma-asr-small, an open-source diffusion ASR model
Pinecone launches Nexus, a knowledge engine for AI agents, into public preview, compiling an organization's documents into a structured knowledge layer for efficient querying.
Z.ai launches ZCode, an agentic development environment for AI-powered coding
xAI launches Grok, a no-code voice agent builder
ByteDance Seed releases EdgeBench, a benchmark for measuring autonomous agents' learning from environment feedback
Portugal releases Amália, a €5.5M open-source AI model for public-sector and enterprise applications
Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
Langchain releases OpenWiki, an open-source agent for generating and maintaining codebase documentation
NVIDIA releases Nemotron-Labs-TwoTower, an open-weight diffusion language model
Anthropic introduces Claude Sonnet 5, an AI model with improved agentic capabilities, comparable to Opus 4.8 but at lower prices.
MongoDB delivers accurate AI retrieval capabilities, addressing enterprise AI project challenges with new Voyage AI models and search features for on-premises and private cloud.
Zilliz announces Loon, a storage engine supporting online search, offline analysis, and batch analytics from a single copy of vector data on low-cost object storage.
NVIDIA releases BioNeMo Agent Toolkit for life sciences researchers, integrating with Claude Science
Cloudflare introduces an open-source AI agent toolkit for SASE migrations
Unconventional AI releases Un-0, an image generator using Kuramoto oscillators
IronCore Labs releases VectorLens, a local CLI tool to scan vectors in databases for PII
Vast.ai promotes Matryoshka embeddings, a technique allowing a single embedding model to produce variable-dimension vectors without retraining, for runtime cost-quality tradeoffs.
OpenAI announces three new AI models: GPT-5.6 Sol, Terra, and Luna, initially limited to trusted partners due to US government request.
Manticore Search releases a new ONNX Runtime backend, making auto-embeddings approximately 14× faster than the previous path on the same hardware and model.
Jumpmind launches CIRCUIT, an open-source framework for AI interpretability risk management
